Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
28 
LTPAC_DSPNSNG_FREQ_CD 
LABEL: 
Long-Term and Post-Acute Care (LTPAC) Dispensing Frequency Code 
DESCRIPTION: This field is used to identify long-term and post-acute care short-cycle (LTPAC) dispensing PDEs. 
SHORT NAME: LTPAC_DSPNSNG_FREQ_CD 
LONG NAME: LTPAC_DSPNSNG_FREQ_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
PDE 
VALUES: 
1 = Medication dispensed in a
